channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: McLaren's Lando Norris wins wet and wild Australian Grand Prix. Hamilton finishes 10th
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — McLaren’s Lando Norris won a chaotic rain-affected Australian Grand Prix, his first victory at Albert Park, with the British driver just managing to stay ahead of Red Bull’s Max Verstappen following a third safety car late in Sunday's season-opening Formula 1 race.
item.dc:creator: STEWART BELL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: The best team in the National League? For two days in Japan, it's looked like the Hanshin Tigers
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — For two days in Japan, it's the Hanshin Tigers who have have looked like the class of the National League.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Frustrating start for Lewis Hamilton and Ferrari at F1 Australian Grand Prix
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Lewis Hamilton’s relationship with his new Ferrari team was pressure tested in Australia, where he finished a disappointing 10th on debut, and was frustrated by a bad strategy Sunday that cost him a potential victory, and constant radio chatter throughout the difficult ra
item.dc:creator: STEWART BELL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Quakes control possession but can’t beat Colorado
item.description: The Earthquakes struggled to find a finishing touch to beat Colorado keeper Zack Steffen in a 2-1 loss Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: No. 6 St. John's beats Creighton 82-66 for 1st Big East Tournament crown in 25 years
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Regular-season champs. A tournament title. Pride in the program fully restored. The pied piper of college basketball rebuilds, Rick Pitino has St. John's back atop the Big East. And this time, the nets were coming down. RJ Luis Jr.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Dick Vitale tears up on ACC Championship broadcast while talking about recent cancer battle
item.description: Dick Vitale became emotional Saturday night while talking about his most recent cancer battle while announcing top-ranked Duke's 73-62 victory over No. 13 Louisville in the Atlantic Coast Conference Tournament championship.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Vikings acquire RB Jordan Mason from 49ers and give him a new 2-year deal, AP source says
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calf. (AP) — The Minnesota Vikings acquired restricted free agent running back Jordan Mason from the San Francisco 49ers and rewarded him with a two-year deal worth up to $12 million.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Proctor, Knueppel carry No. 1 Duke past No. 13 Louisville 73-62 for 2nd ACC title in 3 years
item.description: Tyrese Proctor scored 19 points on six 3-pointers, Kon Knueppel added 18 points and No. 1 Duke defeated 13th-ranked Louisville 73-62 on Saturday night to clinch its second Atlantic Coast Conference Tournament championship in three seasons under Jon Scheyer.
item.dc:creator: Steve Reed, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Tonje scores 32 as No. 18 Wisconsin tops No. 7 Michigan St. 77-74 in Big Ten semis
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — John Tonje scored 32 points and grabbed seven rebounds to help No. 18 Wisconsin beat No. 7 Michigan State 77-74 on Saturday in the semifinals of the Big Ten Tournament. John Blackwell added 14 points as the Badgers (26-8) won for the third time in four days. They will play No.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Draper knocks off 2-time defending champion Alcaraz to reach Indian Wells final
item.description: INDIAN WELLS, Calif. (AP) — Jack Draper toppled two-time defending champion Carlos Alcaraz 6-1, 0-6, 6-4 on Saturday to reach the BNP Paribas Open final. The 13th-seeded Draper will face 12th-seeded Holger Rune on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NCAA's Gavitt: Duke, ACC tell selection committee Flagg will be available for March Madness
item.description: Top-ranked Duke and the Atlantic Coast Conference have informed the NCAA Tournament selection committee that freshman Cooper Flagg will be available for March Madness, NCAA senior vice president for basketball Dan Gavitt said Saturday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alex Ovechkin scores 887th goal to move within 8 of breaking Wayne Gretzky's record
item.description: Alex Ovechkin scored his 887th career goal Saturday to move within eight of breaking Wayne Gretzky’s NHL record.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Clayton scores 22 as No. 4 Florida beats No. 5 Alabama 104-82 in SEC semis
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Walter Clayton Jr. scored 22 points, and No. 4 Florida pulled away from No. 5 Alabama for a 104-82 victory in the Southeastern Conference Tournament semifinals on Saturday. Alijah Martin and Will Richard each had 16 points for the Gators (29-4) in their fifth consecutive win.
item.dc:creator: JIM DIAMOND, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Falcons sticking with Kirk Cousins for now, plan to pay roster bonus: report
item.description: The Atlanta Falcons' front office has decided to keep veteran quarterback Kirk Cousins on the roster through Saturday, which triggers a guaranteed $10 million bonus.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The 49ers bring back Kyle Juszczyk days after cutting him, AP source says
item.description: Fullback Kyle Juszczyk is returning to the San Francisco 49ers on a two-year, $8 million contract just days after being cut, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Withers' lane violation adds improbable twist to UNC's failed comeback against No. 1 Duke in ACCs
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Jae'Lyn Withers stood in a hallway of the Spectrum Center, his left arm resting around the shoulders of North Carolina coach Hubert Davis. He was surrounded by reporters, all wanting to know a simple question.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Zuby Ejiofor much more than just most improved in record-setting performance for No. 6 St. John's
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Maybe most improved didn't really do Zuby Ejiofor justice. The junior forward delivered an overpowering performance Friday night for No. 6 St.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ejiofor powers No. 6 St. John's past No. 25 Marquette 79-63 into 1st Big East final since 2000
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Zuby Ejiofor scored a career-high 33 points, a St. John's record in the Big East Tournament, and the sixth-ranked Red Storm pulled away from No. 25 Marquette 79-63 on Friday night to reach the conference championship game for the first time in 25 years.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tampa, Orlando line up to make pitch to bring Rays to their city
item.description: The development deal to build the Tampa Bay Rays a new stadium in St. Petersburg appears to be dead. Now, other groups are lining up to buy the team and take it to another city.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Patterson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Heartbreak for DePaul as 1st trip to Big East semifinals slips away with late collapse to Creighton
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — At long last, downtrodden DePaul was finally about to produce its own indelible moment at the Big East Tournament. A big upset was in the bag for the Blue Demons — and their first trip to the semifinals at Madison Square Garden. And then it slipped through their fingers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Stephen Curry becomes first player in NBA history to make 4,000 3-pointers
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Stephen Curry's shooting range and accuracy from way back have long stood alone — whether with a defender or two in his face or when letting it fly from the logo.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Third MLB hat pulled over accidental vulgarity as others sell for hundreds online
item.description: Yet another newly released MLB hat has been pulled from online stores after fans noted the potentially crass design the cap sported.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WGN 9

item.title: Cougars make 18 three-pointers in 96-92 victory
item.description: KANSAS CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 23 points, hitting a crucial 3-pointer with less than a minute to go, and No. 17 BYU overcame a big game from Curtis Jones in a 96-90 victory over No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz fined $100,000 for not playing Markkanen
item.description: MEMPHIS (ABC4 Sports) - The NBA on Wednesday fined the Utah Jazz $100,000 for violating its player participation policy.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Volleyball: Del Norte 3, Rancho Bernardo 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-Boys Volleyball at Rancho Bernardo with the Broncos falling in three against Del Norte.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Southwestern League basketball All-Conference teams announced
item.description: It was a wild season filled with buzzer-beaters and many other incredible moments, as we congratulate the great players honored on this year's Southwestern League All-Conference Teams.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: The 49ers lose several key players on the opening day of free agency
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The opening of free agency for the San Francisco 49ers was more about their losses than their additions.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Report: Bears sign veteran DT Grady Jarrett to 3-year deal
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — In what's been quite a big day for the Bears' brass, they have now reportedly added veteran defensive tackle Grady Jarrett.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Bills reward Allen with new contract after NFL MVP season. Deal is worth $330M, AP source says
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — NFL MVP Josh Allen was rewarded Sunday with a contract extension worth $330 million, including an NFL record $250 million of it guaranteed, which makes him among the league’s highest-paid players.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Cavaliers rely on scoring balance to beat Bucks 112-100 for 14th consecutive victory
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Max Strus had 17 points to lead a balanced scoring attack as the NBA-leading Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Milwaukee Bucks 112-100 on Sunday night for their 14th consecutive victory.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, Fox 5
